headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
headlines.description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

headlines.title: Send your Supreme Court questions for Laura Jarrett
headlines.description: We’re awaiting several major decisions from the Supreme Court before the end of the 2026 term, including the high court’s rulings on birthright citizenship and whether President Donald Trump has the authority to unilaterally fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook

headlines.title: Jury reaches a verdict in trial over deadly, destructive Palisades Fire
headlines.description: After two days of deliberations, a jury in the trial about the origin of the devastating January 2025 fires in Los Angeles said jurors on both sides “are unwilling to change their opinion” and that they are “at a standstill,” unsure of how to proceed

headlines.title: NBC News reporter in Venezuela says people she knows might be missing under rubble
headlines.description: Ana Vanessa Herrero, reporting for NBC News in Venezuela, sheds light on the hundreds of people looking for loved ones who might be missing under the rubble after two major earthquakes hit near the country's capital on Wednesday.

headlines.title: Gonzalo Plata vence a Neuer y le da la ventaja a Ecuador
headlines.description: Luego de un tiro de esquina, Kevin Rodríguez cabecea para bajar el balón en el área y Gonzalo Plata con un puntapié arrebata el balón de las manos del portero alemán, para darle la ventaja a los ecuatorianos por 2-1.

headlines.title: Football vs. fútbol: Who is the best Freeman? Dad Antonio salutes son Alex
headlines.description: Alex Freeman, son of former Green Bay Packers wideout Antonio Freeman, has stepped up for the U.S. men’s national team in the World Cup. It’s no surprise to his father.

headlines.title: Out from his father’s shadow, Tim Weah is carving his own path with the U.S.
headlines.description: George Weah won the Ballon d’Or in 1995 and is considered one of the best soccer players of his generation. Now, his son is carving his own path on the U.S. men’s national team.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Is the Tartan party over?
headlines.description: A Brazilian side that featured Neymar sealed the top spot in Group C with a 3-0 win over Scotland yesterday, while the co-hosts Canada progressed to the knockouts for the first time in its history

headlines.title: La increíble celebración de Sebastián Beccacece al segundo gol de Ecuador ante Alemania
headlines.description: ¡Nadie podía creerlo! Ecuador le remontó a Alemania y el técnico Beccacece explotó de alegría con la anotación de Gonzalo Plata, corriendo a las gradas e intentando recobrar la serenidad para los últimos minutos del encuentro.

headlines.title: Gonzalo Plata vence a Neuer y le da la ventaja a Ecuador
headlines.description: Luego de un tiro de esquina, Kevin Rodríguez cabecea para bajar el balón en el área y Gonzalo Plata con un puntapié arrebata el balón de las manos del portero alemán, para darle la ventaja a los ecuatorianos por 2-1.

headlines.title: Doblete de Nicolas Pépé para el 0-2 de Costa de Marfil: Una auténtica definición de crack
headlines.description: Una vez más, el jugador del Villarreal logró romper la defensa de Curazao entre líneas antes de definir con gran categoría.

headlines.title: El día que nació la amistad entre Batistuta y Pochettino | Vive el Mundial
headlines.description: Gabriel Batistuta recuerda cómo Mauricio Pochettino fue el primero en darle la bienvenida a la pensión de Newell's Old Boys. Una amistad nacida a los 14 años que terminó uniendo sus caminos en un Mundial y que hoy sigue más viva que nunca.
